title: lomatium foeniculaceum subsp. inyoense
intro: Lomatium foeniculaceum subsp. inyoense, commonly known as Inyo lomatium, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of California and Nevada in the United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Inyo lomatium include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory infections and other illnesses. In herbal preparations, Inyo lomatium is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves, and is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
